calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-27-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-27-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-19-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Micah R. Jacobs, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Propane Studio, LLC.
Defendant George Rosenfield, an individual, was present in pro per and placed under oath.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was filed on January 13, 2009.
Settlement was reached with defendant Triton Funding Group, Inc., a California corporation, on July 17, 2009.
Dismissal without prejudice was filed as to defendant Residential Pacific Mortgage, Inc. on November 6, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, July 27, 2009.

Settlement agreement of the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Jacobs. In accordance with the terms of the agreement, defendant George Rosenfield shall pay plaintiff Propane Studio, LLC the sum of $10,000.00 on August 15, 2009. Additionally, Mr. Rosenfield shall pay plaintiff the sum of $1,000.00 on the 15th of each month thereafter until the balance of $30,000.00 is paid in full. If the 15th of any month falls on a weekend or holiday, defendant's monthly payment shall be due on the next business day. If Mr. Rosenfield fails to make any monthly payment, plaintiff may, within ten days of notice of default to Mr. Rosenfield, obtain entry of judgment for the full amount owed plus 10% interest.

If Mr. Rosenfield complies with the afore-mentioned terms, plaintiff shall dismiss the matter and a mutual release pursuant to Civil Code Section 1542 shall issue.

Defendant George Rosenfield was voir dired by the Court as to the terms and his understanding of the agreement. Mr. Jacobs shall reduce the terms of this agreement to writing.

Matter is continued to April 19, 2011 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2009 Off Calendar
